title: Safe Crystals
description: Prevents punching obsidian while holding an end crystal (client-side).
body:
### SafeCrystals (NoCrystalBreak) - v1.1.3
#### Demonstration
![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/zpisRGh.gif)

#### Overview

SafeCrystal prevents accidental obsidian breaking while placing end crystals, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted crystal placement.

#### Description

In vanilla Minecraft, holding an end crystal and repeatedly attempting to break nearby crystals can unintentionally trigger block-breaking on obsidian. This interrupts crystal placement and reduces combat efficiency.
SafeCrystal disables this client-side behavior, allowing precise crystal placement without triggering the breaking animation.

#### Features

* Prevents accidental obsidian breaking when holding end crystals
* Ensures smooth and uninterrupted crystal placement
* Eliminates unwanted breaking animation
* Improves placement consistency during fast crystal combat

#### Requirements

* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API
